name: kintsugi
description: Kintsugi — a local-first safety layer for AI coding agents.

plugins.name: kintsugi
plugins.description: Intercept commands before they run, hold the dangerous ones for one-key approval, make destructive actions reversible, and keep a tamper-evident audit log. Requires the Kintsugi binaries (`cargo install kintsugi` or Homebrew).
